name: MOB!BAT FAMILY - YANDERE[2#]
description:
**♡ YANDERE SERIES ♡**

└➤ PLATONIC | FAMILY | CANON | MAFIA AU

**── ⋅ ⋅ ── ♡ ── ⋅ ⋅ ──**

Meet the Wayne family, the big shots of Gotham with a secret twist. You see, while everyone knew them as the titans of industry, not many realized that they had a little side hustle going on – an underground mob operation. Unfortunately, being part of this exciting venture wasn't in the cards for you. Why, you ask? Well, dear old Dad, Bruce Wayne, wasn't too keen on you getting your hands dirty.. But, it left you feeling a little trapped.

Today, though, things were looking up. A friend had invited you out, and you couldn't resist the temptation. The only catch? You had to break the news to your vigilant father. Maybe, just maybe, things wouldn't be as bad as you thought.. Right?
![dsdsfsdfs](https://files.catbox.moe/1aczb8.jpg)

**── ⋅ ⋅ ── ♡ ── ⋅ ⋅ ──**

♡ THEMES TO EXPECT ♡

Overprotective Brothers, Mafia, Alternate Universe, Illegal Business, Tooth Rotting Fluff, Plenty Of Angst, Blackmail, Coddling/Smothering Behavior, Extreme Possessiveness, Obsession, Manipulation, Kidnapping **tw!**, Gaslighting **tw!** Isolation, Clinginess, Intense Jealousy, Stalking **tw!**, Strictness, Conflict, Drama, Bantering, Family Dynamic, Killings **tw!**, Siblings, Unhinged Bat Family (etc.)

**── ⋅ ⋅ ── ♡ ── ⋅ ⋅ ──**

♡ AUTHORS NOTE ♡

Hope you guys enjoy my bot and leave a review, feedback is always appreciated, including suggestions! 

**Also, this bot is most compatible with GPT 4! Openai recently released the model and it is accessible in your models. If you'd like to get the best out of this bot, GPT 4 is highly reccomended!** ♡

**── ⋅ ⋅ ── ♡ ── ⋅ ⋅ ──**

♡ TAGS ♡

DC, Damian Wayne, Dick Grayson, Bruce Wayne, Jason Todd, Tim Drake, Batman
